g.text: +recordMarks(teacher : Username, course : CourseId, student : Username, att1 : int, att2 : int, exam : int) : Result<Void>
+createCourse(name : String, credits : int, type : DisciplineType, cap : int) : Result<Course>
+addLesson(course : CourseId, type : LessonType, day : WeekDay, time : String, room : String) : Result<Void>
+sendMessage(from : Username, to : Username, subject : String, body : String, urgency : UrgencyLevel) : Result<Void>
+publishNews(author : Username, title : String, body : String) : Result<Void>
+submitRequest(requester : Username, type : HelpType, faculty : Faculty, urgency : UrgencyLevel, info : String) : Result<Void>
+createResearchProject(supervisor : Username, journal : String, topic : String) : Result<ResearchProject>
+publishPaper(author : Username, title : String, journal : String, pages : int, doi : String) : Result<ResearchPaper>
+rateTeacher(student : Username, teacher : Username, rating : int) : Result<Void>
+complainAboutStudent(teacher : Username, student : Username, reason : String) : Result<Void>
-faculty : Faculty {SITE, SEOGI, SG, KMA, ISE, BS}
-credits : Credits {value : int, SEMESTER_LIMIT, covers(), minus(), plus()}
«enum» Op {EQ, NEQ, GT, LT, GTE, LTE, CONTAINS, STARTS_WITH, ENDS_WITH, IN}
